title: Kanban Plan — Parallel Superagent Review of Golden Standard
description: Run six parallel expert subagents, collect six independent markdown reviews, synthesize priorities, and apply high-priority doc updates.

planning_session.author: codex
planning_session.goal: Generate multi-expert critique and improve golden standard docs

DONE.task: Spawn six parallel expert agents with different optics and fixed ownership of separate report files
DONE.notes: Each agent outputs one markdown review
DONE.status_note: Completed: 6 worker agents ran in parallel and produced 6 independent reports in docs/reviews/.

DONE.task: Collect six reports and run separate synthesis agent for dedupe + priority clustering
DONE.status_note: Completed: dedicated synthesis agent produced docs/reviews/review-7-synthesis-priorities.md with overlap and priority map.

DONE.task: Apply high-priority updates to docs/golden-standard.md and docs/golden-standard.html
DONE.status_note: Completed: applied high-priority, cross-expert changes to MD and HTML (governance gate, DoD evidence/coverage/E2E, severity taxonomy, parity rules, anti-pattern extensions).

DONE.task: Validate artifacts and finalize kanban statuses
DONE.status_note: Completed: artifacts verified, updated documents re-published via publish_me, kanban closed.

acceptance_criteria: Six independent review markdown files exist
One synthesis markdown file exists with high/medium/low priorities and overlap analysis
golden-standard md and html updated from high-priority findings
final response includes file paths and what changed
